name: Profile_R5_FamilyMemberHistory_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.FamilyMemberHistory resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 FamilyMemberHistory resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 FamilyMemberHistory resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.FamilyMemberHistory resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 FamilyMemberHistory resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 FamilyMemberHistory resources.

element.short: R5: Who or what participated in the activities related to the family member history and how they were involved (new)
element.comment:
Element `FamilyMemberHistory.participant` has a context of FamilyMemberHistory based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `FamilyMemberHistory`.
Element `FamilyMemberHistory.participant` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Why was family member history performed? additional types
element.comment:
Element `FamilyMemberHistory.reason` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `FamilyMemberHistory.reasonCode` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
Element `FamilyMemberHistory.reason` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `FamilyMemberHistory.reasonReference` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `FamilyMemberHistory.reason` do not cover the following types: CodeableReference.
Textual reasons can be captured using reasonCode.text.

element.short: R5: Procedures that the related person had (new)
element.comment:
Element `FamilyMemberHistory.procedure` has a context of FamilyMemberHistory based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `FamilyMemberHistory`.
Element `FamilyMemberHistory.procedure` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
